name: Spaghitti Vesuvius I.e.s.jjgf65a
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove whole stems from the basil.
2. In a large sauté pan, heat olive oil over medium-low heat.
3. Add minced garlic, onion, and hot pepper red; cook until onion is completely softened but not browned.
4. Cut tomatoes in half from top to bottom without removing seeds or juice; add them cut-side up and cook for five minutes.
5. Sprinkle with salt and a pinch of sugar; carefully turn the tomatoes over.
6. Place the pan in a 225°F oven for 2½ hours, basting occasionally with pan juices.
7. Sprinkle chopped parsley and basil over the tomatoes; continue cooking for an additional 30 minutes.
8. Cook spaghetti in 5 quarts of salted boiling water until al dente; drain and transfer to a pasta dish.
9. Pour tomato mixture over spaghetti and toss together before serving.
10. Makes six servings.
